doc_title_en: Notice of Determination of Matters Concerning Acquisition of Treasury Stock (Acquisition of treasury stock based on Articles of Incorporation per Companies Act Section 459(1))

key_facts.reason_jp: 資本効率の向上を通じて株主のみなさまへの利益還元

summary_en: 170,000 shares (0.55% of S/O) up to ¥500M via open-market purchase on TSE. Execution window: May 18–Aug 31, 2026. Stated rationale: capital efficiency and shareholder returns.
summary_jp: 発行済の0.55％に相当する170,000株、上限5億円。東証市場買付。実行期間：2026年5月18日～8月31日。資本効率向上を通じた株主還元が目的。
tag_en: Buyback - 170,000 shares (0.55% S/O) - ¥500M - Open market - May 18–Aug 31, 2026
tag_jp: 自己株式取得 - 170,000株（発行済の0.55％）- 5億円 - 市場買付 - 2026年5月18日～8月31日
